_comment_confidence: Drop transcription rows whose ASR confidence (the trailing (NN%)) is below this. Rows with no parsable confidence are kept.
_comment_top_k: Candidates re-ranked per utterance at deployment (smaller than the Step 10 default of 20 to stretch the LLM budget).
_comment_cost: Live ledger converts gpt-oss-120b calls to dollars and STOPS adding utterances to the LLM stage before dollar_cap. Remaining utterances keep their cosine score only.
_comment_thresholds: PROVISIONAL: tuned on the saturated Y1 set (Step 11). Labels are review hints; the score columns are the source of truth. Reviewer spot-checks and may retune for Y2.
_comment_science_only: When true, each per-child sheet contains ONLY utterances labeled SCIENCE_TALK (no-science child sheets are dropped, the SUMMARY sheet is omitted). Set false to write the full transcript with every kept utterance plus the SUMMARY sheet.
_comment_summary: Number of highest-scoring science utterances to surface on the per-workbook SUMMARY sheet (full-transcript mode only).
_comment_c49: Classroom49_012026 has _old / _updated / plain duplicates; keep only the folder ending in this suffix and skip the others.
